{{CargoRelic
|name=Godfather's Pipe
|class_id=20758
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=A handcrafted briar wood pipe, finely polished to present a deep brown luster, with a warm and delicate touch. The pipe's stem is slightly heavy, providing a stable grip. Through this pipe, one can almost see that unfathomable figure and the empire of the mafia behind him...
|fame=18
|art=15
|fth=30
|civ=14
|tech=13
|ss1=B-tad rewards from offering +0.4%<br>Per Partner you have, Snail RUSH +3<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss2=B-tad rewards from offering +0.8%<br>Per Partner you have, Snail RUSH +6<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss3=B-tad rewards from offering +1.2%<br>Per Partner you have, Snail RUSH +9<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss4=B-tad rewards from offering +1.2%<br>Per Partner you have, Snail RUSH +9<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss7=B-tad rewards from offering +1.2%<br>Per Partner you have, Snail RUSH +9<br>Current Partners: 15/15<br> (Awakened)
}}
